onChange.script:
system.perspective.sendMessage("SerialNumberFocus", scope="page")
	try: 
		if len(str(self.props.text)) > 0:
			self.props.style.fontSize = 20
			self.props.style.fontWeight = "bold"
			self.props.style.backgroundColor = "#FF0000"
			self.props.style.color = "#FFFFFF"

			self.props.style.fontSize = 20

messageHandlers.script:
try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Update Index for new Operation in OPList.
		"""
		# implement your handler here
		OPCodes=self.getChild("FlexRepeater").props.instances
		
		Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		#getting current Index
		current_index = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/Index"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
	
		system.perspective.print("Current_Index")
		system.perspective.print(current_index)
		totalsteps=len(OPCodes)
		#Incrementing index + 1 to get next
		next_index=(current_index + 1)
		#check if list is not over
		SerialNumber = self.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntSerialNumber").getChild("Label").props.text
		stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		state='Info'
		userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
		ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
		data="Acknowledge For OP Data Saving Sent to PLC for %s"%(SerialNumber)
		Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
		All_Operations_Complete = False
		if next_index < totalsteps:
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/Index"%(Area,Line,WS), next_index)
			messageType = 'UpdateOPList'  	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		#	val=''
			OPType = OPCodes[next_index]['OPType']
			OPCode = OPCodes[next_index]['OPCode']
			Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
			Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
			WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPType"%(Area,Line,WS), OPType)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPCode"%(Area,Line,WS), OPCode)
			self.view.getChild("root").custom.OPReadyTagPath = None
			self.view.getChild("root").custom.OPFinishTagPath = None
		else:
#			system.perspective.print("Faulted Value:%s"%str(self.session.custom.IsFaultedTorque))
			#send all operation complete to PLC and get General Result Ready/Status and flash data 
			All_Operations_Complete = True
			
			Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
			Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
			WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
			try:
				system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/OP_Ready_ENABLE"%(Area,Line,WS), 0)
			except:
				pass
			SerialNumber = self.parent.getChild("cntTime").getChild("TextField").props.text
			stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
			state='Info'
			userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
			ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
			data="All Opeartion Complete for Serial Number %s sent to PLC"%(SerialNumber)
			Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)
			
			
			Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
			Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
			WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
			flex_repeater = self.getChild("FlexRepeater")
			Currentindex=system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/Index"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
			if str(self.view.getChild("root").custom.IsByPassed).lower() == 'True'.lower():	
				flex_repeater.props.instances[Currentindex]["Status"] = "ByPass"
				
			elif str(self.session.custom.IsFaultedTorque).lower() == 'True'.lower():
				flex_repeater.props.instances[Currentindex]["Status"] = "Faulted"
			else:
				flex_repeater.props.instances[Currentindex]["Status"] = "Completed"
			flex_repeater.props.instances = flex_repeater.props.instances
			#if exceed time crosses the cusion time ask for reason and flush data.
			if self.parent.getChild("cntTime").getChild("cntProcessTime").custom.exceedTime > self.parent.getChild("cntTime").getChild("cntProcessTime").custom.cusionTime:
#				self.session.custom.Flash = True
				self.session.custom.processTime = 0
				self.session.custom.cycleTime = 0
				self.session.custom.ExceedEndTime = system.date.now()
				exceedTime = self.parent.getChild("cntTime").getChild("cntProcessTime").custom.exceedTime

#				message = "Process Time exceeded by %s sec"%exceedTime
#				system.perspective.openPopup(id='#exceed', view='Project_VECV/Operator Dashboard/ExceedPopUp',params={'warningMessage':message,'operator_Id':self.parent.getChild("cntTime").getChild("cntOperatorID").getChild("OperatorID").props.text},showCloseIcon = False)
				self.session.custom.exceedTime = 0
					
#				state = 'Info'
#				message = "All Operations are Completed"
#				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
			self.parent.getChild("cntBar").getChild("cntOperatorMsg").getChild("Label").props.text = "All Operations are Completed" 
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/Acknowledge_For_OP_Data_Saving"%(Area,Line,WS), 1)
		if All_Operations_Complete:
			self.view.getChild("root").custom.FinalData.All_Operations_Complete = True
		self.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("cntOPCheck").getChild("Checkbox").props.selected = False
		self.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("cntOPCheck").getChild("Checkbox").props.enabled = False
		
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/MES_OP_Finish"%(Area,Line,WS), 0)
		OPType = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPType"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
		if OPType == "Torque":
			val = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/%s"%(Area,Line,WS,str(OPType)))[0].value
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/%s"%(Area,Line,WS,str(OPType)), (int(val)+1))
		elif OPType == "Pressing Operation":
			val = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/%s"%(Area,Line,WS,str(OPType)))[0].value
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/%s"%(Area,Line,WS,str(OPType)), (int(val)+1))
		elif OPType == "Process Status":
			val = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/%s"%(Area,Line,WS,str(OPType)))[0].value
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/%s"%(Area,Line,WS,str(OPType)), (int(val)+1))	
		elif OPType == "Double Torque":
			system.perspective.print("line 106")
			val = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/%s"%(Area,Line,WS,str('Torque')))[0].value
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/%s"%(Area,Line,WS,str('Torque')), (int(val)+2))	
		
#		self.parent.getChild("cntTime").getChild("PartScanID").props.text = ''
	except:
		screenName ='WorkStation'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Operator Dashboard/WorkStation')  
		errorFunction = str('Event on message handler  -> Index_value_update')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Insert Data for SOP.
	"""
	Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
	Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
	WorkStation=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
	tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/StationInProgress'%(Area,Line,WorkStation)
	IsStationProgress = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPath)[0].value
	#Insert data into Instance for OPList 
	if IsStationProgress:
		tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/OPList'%(Area,Line,WorkStation)
		Instances = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPath)[0].value
		self.getChild("FlexRepeater").props.instances = Instances
		self.getChild("FlexRepeater").meta.visible = True
	else:
		ModelId = payload['ModelId']
		WorkStationId = payload['WorkStationId']
		BomId = payload['BomId']
		params={'ModelId':ModelId,'WorkStationId':WorkStationId,'BomId':BomId}
		result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/getOPCodeList",params)
		pyval=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(result)
		OPCodes=[]
		cnt=0
		if len(pyval) > 0:
	
			for row in pyval:
				Num=cnt+1
				OPCode=row['OPCode']
				OPDefinition=row['OPDefinition']
				Text=row['AttributeText']
				Image=row['ImagePath']
				WS=str(OPCode)+"-"+OPDefinition
				ToolId = row['ToolId']
				ProgramId = row['ProgramId']
				IsMinMaxReq = row['IsMinMaxReq']
				MaxVal = row['MaxVal']
				MinVal = row['MinVal']
				WorkInstructionId = row['WorkInstructionId']
				OPCodeId = row['OPCodeId']
				OPDefinitionId = row['OPDefinitionId']
				WITypeId = row['WITypeId']
				ImageName = row['ImageName']
				TorqueMarking = row['TorqueMarking']
				TorqueQuantity = row['TorqueQuantity']
				PartId = row['PartId']
				MarriagePart = row['MarriagePart']
				OPCodes.append({'Number':"#"+str(Num),'WorkInstruction':WS,'Text':Text,'ImagePath':Image,'Status':'','OPType':OPDefinition,'OPCode':OPCode,
				'ToolId':ToolId,'ProgramId':ProgramId,'IsMinMaxReq':IsMinMaxReq,'MaxVal':MaxVal,'MinVal':MinVal, 'WorkInstructionId':WorkInstructionId, 'PartId':PartId,
				'OPCodeId':OPCodeId, 'OPDefinitionId':OPDefinitionId, 'WITypeId':WITypeId, 'ImageName':ImageName,'TorqueMarking':TorqueMarking,'TorqueQuantity':TorqueQuantity,'MarriagePart':MarriagePart})
				cnt=cnt+1
			#adding data to tags and instance for OPlist	
			tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/OPList'%(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName, self.session.custom.CurrentLineName, self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
			system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPath, [OPCodes])
			self.getChild("FlexRepeater").props.instances=OPCodes

			OPType = OPCodes[0]['OPType']
			OPCode = OPCodes[0]['OPCode']
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPType"%(Area,Line,WorkStation), OPType)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPCode"%(Area,Line,WorkStation), OPCode)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/Index"%(Area,Line,WorkStation), 0)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/TotalOPIndex"%(Area,Line,WorkStation), len(OPCodes))
			if OPType != 'Visual WI' and OPType != 'Error Proofing' and OPType != 'Operator Scan' and OPType != 'Process Data':
				system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/%s"%(Area,Line,WorkStation,OPType), 1)
			SerialNumber = self.view.getChild("root").custom.SerialNumber
			BOM = self.view.getChild("root").custom.BOM
			payload = {'SerialNumber':SerialNumber,'Model':BOM} 		
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType="SendInitialDataToPLC",scope = 'page',payload=payload)
		else:
			self.parent.getChild("cntBar").getChild("cntOperatorMsg").getChild("Label").props.text = "No WorkInstruction Configured for the Station " + str(self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
			self.session.custom.WONumber = ''
			self.session.custom.BOM = ''
			self.session.custom.Model = ''
			self.session.custom.BOMDesc = ''
			self.parent.getChild("cntTime").getChild("TextField").props.text = ''
			messageType = 'Updateheader'  	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
			self.session.custom.ExceedEndTime = ''
			self.session.custom.IsTimeExceed = False
			self.session.custom.cycleTime = 0
			self.session.custom.exceedStartTime = ''
			self.session.custom.exceedTime = 0
			self.session.custom.processEndTime = ''
			self.session.custom.processStartTime = '' 
			self.session.custom.processTime = 0

config.script:
try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Update UI after Partial New Start
		"""
		if (str(self.session.custom.CurrentLineName).upper() != 'HUB SUB ASSY LINE'.upper()):
			Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
			Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
			WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
			logNC = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/LogNC"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
			partialStart = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/Partial_New_Start"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
			#check LOGNC is not done for current operation if yes then partial not allowed
	#		if str(logNC).upper() == "False".upper() and str(partialStart).upper() == "False".upper():
			if str(logNC).upper() == "False".upper():
				system.util.getLogger("Inside IF").info(str(logNC))
				SerialNumber = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntSerialNumber").getChild("Label").props.text
		 		if SerialNumber == "":
		 			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntBar").getChild("cntOperatorMsg").getChild("Label").props.text = "Please Scan Serial Number"
		 		else:
		 			system.util.getLogger("Inside else").info(str(logNC))
					Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
					Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
					WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
					StationProgress = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/StationInProgress"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
					if StationProgress:
						currentIndex = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/Index"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
						system.perspective.openPopup("#partialStart", view='Project_VECV/Operator Dashboard/opListPartialStart',params={'currentIndex':currentIndex},title="Select OPCode for Partial Start",modal=True)
					else:
						self.parent.parent.getChild("cntBar").getChild("cntOperatorMsg").getChild("Label").props.text = "No Operation Started for this Serial Number."
	except:
		screenName ='WorkStation'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order dashboard/WorkStation')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onClickevent---PartialStart')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print(str(description) + '  ' + str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
					#End of except block

try:
 		"""
 			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
 			Written Date: 30/05/2024
 			Purpose: Option for Takeout and LogNC
 		"""
 		Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
 		CurrentOPType = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPType"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
 		if 'Operator Scan' not in CurrentOPType:
	 		SerialNumber = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntSerialNumber").getChild("Label").props.text
	 		#check if serial number available for partial start
	 		if SerialNumber == "":
	 			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntBar").getChild("cntOperatorMsg").getChild("Label").props.text = "Please Scan Serial Number"
	 		else:
				Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
				Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
				WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
				StationProgress = system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/StationInProgress"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
				#open Popup for Takeout and LOGNC
				if StationProgress:
					system.perspective.openPopup(id = '#qualityPopup', view = 'Project_VECV/Operator Dashboard/QualityPopUp', title = 'Quality', draggable = False, modal = True)
				else:
					self.parent.parent.getChild("cntBar").getChild("cntOperatorMsg").getChild("Label").props.text = "No Operation Started for this Serial Number."

		screenName ='WorkStation'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Operator Dashboard/WorkStation')

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/05/2024
			Purpose: Save Defect in Table.
		"""
		params = {
		'AreaId' :  self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId,
		'LineId' : self.session.custom.CurrentLineId,
		'WorkStationId' : self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId,
		'SerialNumber' : self.view.getChild("root").custom.SerialNumber,
		'OrderNumber' : self.view.getChild("root").custom.WONumber,
		'BOMId' : self.view.getChild("root").custom.BOMId,
		'OpId' : self.view.getChild("root").custom.OPCodeId,
		'DefectId' : payload['Id'],
		'OperatorID' : self.session.custom.loggedInUserId, 
		'Comments' : payload['comments'],
		'CreatedBy' : self.session.custom.loggedInUserId,
		'DefectName' : payload['defectName']}
		self.custom.MarriagePart = False
		dataset = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/InsertDefect',params)
		state = 'success'
		message = 'Data Saved Successfully'
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	

		system.util.getLogger("Take Out Message handler script").info("script called")
		WorkInstructionId = self.view.getChild("root").custom.WorkInstructionId
		OPCodeId = self.view.getChild("root").custom.OPCodeId
		OPDefinitionId = self.view.getChild("root").custom.OPDefinitionId
		WITypeId = self.view.getChild("root").custom.WITypeId
		seqNo = self.view.getChild("root").custom.seqNo
		
		Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		OPType=system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPType"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/OP_Ready_ACK"%(Area,Line,WS),0)
		system.perspective.print("Take Out Message Handler Script--OPType:%s"%OPType)
		payload = {}
		

		SerialNumber = self.view.getChild("root").custom.SerialNumber
		WorkStationId = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		BOMId = self.view.getChild("root").custom.BOMId
		ModifiedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		
		#### ADD Takeout event in StationEvent table
		payload = {'EventID':Project_VECV.config.getTakeOutID() , 'OPCodeId':OPCodeId, 'OPDefinitionId':OPDefinitionId,
		'MST_Status_Id':3, 'OrderNumber':self.view.getChild("root").custom.WONumber}
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType='InsertIntoStationEvents', payload=payload, scope='page')
		
		#### Add Takeout event in Takein_TakeOut table
		params={'areaid':self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId,'Lineid':self.session.custom.CurrentLineId,'serial':SerialNumber,
		'ordernum':self.view.getChild("root").custom.WONumber,'bomid':BOMId,'station':WorkStationId,'operator':ModifiedBy}
		system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/InsertTakeOutData",params)		
		
		### Update Release Production Order table with Takeout event
		ModifiedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		OrderNumber = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntOrder").getChild("Label").props.text
		Project_VECV.OperatorDashboard.OperatorDashboard.UpdateOrderStatus(ModifiedBy, SerialNumber, BOMId, OrderNumber)
		
		SerialNumber = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("cntSerialNumber").getChild("Label").props.text
		stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		state='Info'
		userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
		ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
		Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation				
		OP_Code=system.tag.readBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/OP_Code"%(Area,Line,WS))[0].value
		data="Take Out for Serial Number %s from OP%s"%(SerialNumber,OP_Code)

				has_letter = any(char.isalpha() for char in input_string)

				# Return True only if the string contains both letters and numbers
				return has_letter and has_number
			is_valid = validate_string(input_string)

				tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/IDScan/Data'%(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName,self.session.custom.CurrentLineName,self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)

			else:
				self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntBar").getChild("cntOperatorMsg").getChild("Label").props.text="Please scan correct Operator ID"

	else:
		self.props.text = ''

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Populate Screen based on Station Progress.
	"""
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("TextField").props.text = ''
	payload={"originatingComponent": self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("TextField").meta.name}
	tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/SerialNumber'%(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName, self.session.custom.CurrentLineName,self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
	serialNumber = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPath)[0].value
	system.perspective.print("serialNumber %s"%serialNumber)
	#check whether the Serial is still in progress 
	if serialNumber != '' and str(serialNumber).lower() != 'None'.lower():
		#fetch old data
		self.session.custom.OPReadyRefresh = True
		self.session.custom.OPFinishRefresh = True
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("TextField").props.text = serialNumber
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("cntProcessTime").custom.processTime = self.session.custom.processTime
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("cntProcessTime").custom.exceedTime = self.session.custom.exceedTime
	else:
		#flush data from screen
		self.session.custom.cycleTime = 0
		self.session.custom.processTime = 0
		self.session.custom.exceedTime = 0
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("TextField").props.text = ''
		system.perspective.sendMessage("FlushAllData", scope="page")
#		state = 'Info'
#		message = "Please Scan Serial Number"
#		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlertOnDWI(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","",self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("TextField").meta.name)
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBar").getChild("cntOperatorMsg").getChild("Label").props.text = "Please Scan Serial Number"
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("PartScanID").props.text = ''
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("PartScanID").props.enabled = False
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("cntOperatorID").getChild("OperatorID").props.enabled = False
		
		WorkStationID = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		LineID = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		AreaID = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
		#Get popup for subassembly variant wise
		if LineID in Project_VECV.config.getVariantLineID():
			queryPath = 'Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/getPrevStationDetails'
			params = {'AreaID':AreaID,'LineID':LineID,'WorkStationID':WorkStationID}
			dataset = system.db.runNamedQuery(queryPath,params)
			flag = False
			for data in dataset:
				wsId =  data['prevMST_WorkStation_Id']
				if str(wsId) == '0':
					flag = True
				else:
					queryPath = 'Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/getStationType'
					params = {'workStationID':wsId}
					dataset = system.db.runNamedQuery(queryPath,params)
					for data in dataset:
						if data['MST_WorkStationType_Id'] == 4:
							flag = True
			if flag:
				CurrentMode = Project_VECV.config.getMode()[str(LineID)]
				system.perspective.openPopup("#SerialDashboard", view="Project_VECV/Operator Dashboard/GetDashBoardSerialNo",params={'CurrentMode':CurrentMode, "warning":''},showCloseIcon = False,modal=True)
	#add focus on serial number scan
	system.perspective.sendMessage("SerialNumberFocus", scope="page")
	tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPType'%(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName, self.session.custom.CurrentLineName,self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
	OPType = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPath)[0].value
	#check for current optype and populate on screen 
	if OPType == 0:
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAction").getChild("cntOPType").getChild("Label_val").props.text = ''
	else:
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAction").getChild("cntOPType").getChild("Label_val").props.text = OPType
		
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntTime").getChild("TextField").props.enabled = True

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Add Acknowledge read request log into logger file. 
	"""
	if currentValue.value != previousValue.value and currentValue.value != False and currentValue.value !=0 and currentValue.value != None:

		data="OP Ready Enabled sent for %s"%SerialNumber
		Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,data)

if currentValue.value == 1:
		self.custom.MEStoPLC.Index = 0

"""
		Written By: Amit Ravat

		Purpose: Logic to check correct part scan in PTV formart or not. 
	"""
	if currentValue.value != previousValue.value and currentValue.value != 0 and str(currentValue.value).lower() != 'None'.lower() and currentValue.value != '' and str(currentValue.value) != '0':

			Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName

					part = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/LDMarriageErrorProofing",{"SerialNumber":SerialNumber})

						stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation

		flex_repeater = self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntOPList").getChild("FlexRepeater")		
		Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName

		steps = flex_repeater.props.instances
		#OPlist
		flag = 0
		for i in range(len(steps)):
			if str(steps[i]['WorkInstruction'].split('-')[0]) == str(LOGNCOpCode):
				flag = 1
				PartialStartIndex = i
				OPCode = steps[i]['WorkInstruction'].split('-')[0]
				OPType = steps[i]['WorkInstruction'].split('-')[1]
			if flag == 1:
				flex_repeater.props.instances[i]["Status"] = ""
				
		
		
		system.perspective.print("partialcurrentIndex Index --> partial Start %s "%PartialStartIndex)
		self.session.custom.IsByPassed = False
		self.session.custom.IsFaultedTorque =False
		flex_repeater.props.instances = flex_repeater.props.instances  # Force UI update
		tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/OPList'%(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName, self.session.custom.CurrentLineName, self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPath, [flex_repeater.props.instances])
		
		
		pressingcount = 0
		torquecount = 0
		processcount =0
		tagpath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/OPList'%(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName,self.session.custom.CurrentLineName,self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
		data = system.tag.readBlocking(tagpath)[0].value
		for i in data:
			optype =  i["WorkInstruction"].split('-')[1]
			if i['Status'] == '':
				break
			if optype == 'Pressing Operation':
				pressingcount += 1
			elif optype == 'Torque':
				torquecount += 1
			elif optype == 'Process Status':
				processcount += 1
			elif optype == "Double Torque":
				torquecount += 2
		system.util.getLogger("pressingcount").info(str(pressingcount))
		system.util.getLogger("torquecount").info(str(torquecount))
		system.util.getLogger("processcount").info(str(processcount))
		
	
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/Index"%(Area,Line,WS), PartialStartIndex)
		Area=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		Line=self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WS=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPType"%(Area,Line,WS), OPType)
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/MESCommonTags/OPCode"%(Area,Line,WS), OPCode)
		tagPath = "[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/CommonTags/MES_OP_Finish"%(Area,Line,WS)
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPath, 0)
		if OPType == "Torque":
			torquecount += 1
		elif OPType == "Pressing Operation":
			pressingcount += 1
		elif OPType == "Process Status":
			processcount +=1
		elif OPType == "Double Torque":
			torquecount += 2
		tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/Torque'%(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName,self.session.custom.CurrentLineName,self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPath, torquecount)
		
		tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/Pressing Operation'%(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName,self.session.custom.CurrentLineName,self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPath, pressingcount)
		
		tagPath = '[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/Count/Process Status'%(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName,self.session.custom.CurrentLineName,self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPath, processcount)

	"""

	"""
	try:
		# Browse the Tag Provider named "default".
		Area = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		Line =  self.session.custom.CurrentLineName
		WS =  self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		baseTagPath = "[default]Dewas/%s/%s/%s/%s"%(Area,Line,WS,self.custom.OPReadyTagPath)

		result = system.tag.browse(baseTagPath)

		tagPaths=[]
		tagValues=[]
		for resultTag in result.getResults():
			fullTagPath=resultTag["fullPath"]
			tagPaths.append(str(fullTagPath))
			tagValues.append(0)

		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPaths, tagValues)
		system.util.getLogger("Check Tag Path").info(tagPaths)
	except:
		screenName ='WorkStation'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order dashboard/WorkStation')
